examples: London's third great function, since the seventeenth century, has been that of national and international bourse: the exchange of stocks and shares, banking, commerce and, increasingly, insurance.
The Shanghai bourse fell by about 14%.
Business confidence has picked up, as has the Paris bourse.
In Brazil itself, the real's flotation sparked a 33% one-day surge on the depressed bourse.
In 2011, the government rejected a takeover of Australia's main bourse operator, ASX Ltd.
